text:
1 API key. 100+ models. 0% markup fees. Fully open source.

Anything else feels like a scam now.
notes: Pinned positioning: single API key, 100+ models, zero markup, open source.

text:
Connor is an ex @helicone_ai intern turned YC founder.

He built @tryreplicas while working at Helicone. We used it internally to handle about 70% of our bug reports.
notes: Retweet ties Helicone to Replicas, a background coding agent used internally for bug reports.

text:
We're excited to share that Helicone is joining @mintlify!

What this means for our users: Helicone is moving into maintenance mode. Your data is safe and the platform will continue to be accessible, but we will not be shipping new features going forward.

Thank you to the
notes: Important operational status: Helicone joined Mintlify and moved into maintenance mode.

text:
Replying to @NocodeTalks

I occasionally use Openrouter.

I'm a big fan of @helicone_ai? Not only centralised billing across 100s of models but also incredible analytics.
notes: Customer-language proof for Helicone value: model billing and analytics.

text:
psa: this is your end of year reminder to turn on prompt caching in your fav LLM provider.

gateways like @LiteLLM @PortkeyAI @helicone_ai also have ways to do this

this gets you the same output with none of the uncertainty of embedding caching redis is selling these days
notes: Positions Helicone among gateway tools for prompt caching and cost control.

text:
LLMOps platform behind the fastest-growing AI companies.

AI Gateway + LLM Observability. Fully open-source.
notes: Profile positioning anchors the account as production AI infrastructure.
